title: tripleurospermum trichophyllum
intro: Tripleurospermum trichophyllum, also known as American goldenraff, is a flowering plant in the carrot family, native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. It has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
